docs.title: Outcomes Working Group Data Model
docs.text: The Outcomes Working Group Data Model is a LinkML schema for representing biological measurements, assays, and experimental protocols in the context of environmental health sciences (EHS) outcomes research.

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text:
This data model provides a standardized way to capture and exchange data about:

  • Exposure events - Chemical, dietary, environmental, and occupational exposures
  • Biological measurements - Biomarkers, gene/protein expression, phenotypes
  • Health outcomes - Diseases, adverse outcomes, and phenotypic traits
  • Study metadata - Studies, cohorts, and participant information
  • Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs) - Mechanistic links from exposure to outcome
  • Model systems - Cell cultures, organoids, and in vitro exposure systems

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
The schema integrates with major biomedical ontologies including:

Domain Ontologies Chemicals ChEBI, PubChem, ChEMBL, DSSTox Phenotypes HP, MP, ZP, UPHENO Diseases MONDO Anatomy UBERON Cell Types CL, CLO Exposures ECTO, ENVO Units UO, UCUM, QUDT

docs.title: Flexible Measurement Framework
docs.text:
The model supports multiple measurement types:

  • ExposureMeasurement - Quantified exposure levels
  • BiomarkerMeasurement - Biological marker concentrations
  • PhenotypeMeasurement - Observable trait measurements
  • GeneExpressionMeasurement - mRNA expression levels
  • ProteinExpressionMeasurement - Protein levels and modifications
  • AggregatedMeasurement - Summary statistics across cohorts

docs.title: In Vitro Systems Support
docs.text:
Comprehensive support for cell-based model systems:

  • 2D and 3D cell cultures
  • Co-culture systems
  • Air-liquid interface exposures
  • Aerosol generation parameters
  • Environmental and mechanical measurements

docs.title: Synthetic Population Modeling
docs.text:
Geographic hierarchy for population-level analysis:

  • States, Counties, Census Tracts, Block Groups
  • Households and Persons
  • School assignments

docs.title: Browse the Schema
docs.text: Navigate to the Schema Overview to explore all classes, slots, and enumerations defined in the model.

docs.title: Use the Schema
docs.text:
The schema can be used to:

  1. Validate data - Ensure your data conforms to the model
  2. Generate code - Create Python dataclasses, Pydantic models, JSON Schema
  3. Transform data - Convert between JSON, YAML, RDF, and other formats

docs.title: Example Data
docs.text: The repository includes complete example datasets demonstrating different aspects of the data model. Click any example to expand and view the full YAML.

docs.title: Measurement Type Examples
docs.text:
Exposure Measurements - PM2.5, ozone, and cotinine exposure data 
# Example ExposureMeasurement data for environmental toxicant research
# Demonstrates the Quantity pattern with value + unit object
# and OntologyReference pattern with id + name for readability

exposure_measurements:
  - id: owg:exposure-003
    name: PM2.5 personal exposure - Participant P002
    description: 24-hour integrated personal PM2.5 exposure from wearable monitor
    observation_type: pm2_5_exposure
    quantity_measured:
      value: "18.5"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000301
        name: microgram per cubic meter
    measured_entity:
      id: ENVO:01000415
      name: Particulate matter with aerodynamic diameter less than or equal to 2.5 micrometers
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-002
      name: Participant 002
    measurement_method: Personal exposure monitor (RTI MicroPEM)
    measurement_date: "2024-03-16"
    sample_type: air

  - id: owg:exposure-004
    name: Urinary cotinine - Participant P003
    description: Urinary cotinine as biomarker of tobacco smoke exposure
    observation_type: urinary_cotinine_level
    quantity_measured:
      value: "125.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000271
        name: nanogram per milliliter
    range_low:
      value: "0.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000271
        name: nanogram per milliliter
    range_high:
      value: "10.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000271
        name: nanogram per milliliter
    measured_entity:
      id: CHEBI:68641
      name: Cotinine
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-003
      name: Participant 003
    measurement_method: LC-MS/MS
    measurement_date: "2024-03-17"
    sample_type: urine

  - id: owg:exposure-005
    name: Ozone exposure - Participant P004
    description: Ambient ozone concentration at participant residence
    observation_type: ozone_exposure
    quantity_measured:
      value: "0.065"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000170
        name: parts per million
    measured_entity:
      id: CHEBI:25812
      name: Ozone
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-004
      name: Participant 004
    measurement_method: UV photometric analyzer
    measurement_date: "2024-03-18"
    sample_type: air
Biomarker Measurements - Oxidative stress and inflammatory biomarkers 
# Example BiomarkerMeasurement data for respiratory health research
# Includes oxidative stress markers, inflammatory cytokines, and CFTR function

biomarker_measurements:
  # Oxidative Stress Markers
  - id: owg:biomarker-001
    name: Exhaled breath condensate 8-isoprostane - Participant P001
    description: Lipid peroxidation marker in exhaled breath condensate
    observation_type: lipid_peroxidation
    quantity_measured:
      value: "45.2"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    range_low:
      value: "10.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    range_high:
      value: "35.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    biomarker_type: Oxidative stress
    measured_entity:
      id: CHEBI:27894
      name: 8-isoprostane
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-001
      name: Participant 001
    measurement_method: ELISA
    measurement_date: "2024-03-15"

  # Inflammatory Cytokines
  - id: owg:biomarker-003
    name: Sputum IL-8 level - Participant P002
    description: Interleukin-8 concentration in induced sputum
    observation_type: IL8_level
    quantity_measured:
      value: "2450.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    range_low:
      value: "100.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    range_high:
      value: "1500.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: picogram per milliliter
    biomarker_type: Pro-inflammatory cytokine
    measured_entity:
      id: PR:000001562
      name: Interleukin-8
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-002
      name: Participant 002
    measurement_method: Multiplex cytokine assay (Luminex)
    measurement_date: "2024-03-16"
Phenotype Measurements - Pulmonary function and clinical phenotypes 
# Example PhenotypeMeasurement data for respiratory health outcomes
# Includes lung function tests, FeNO, and ciliary function measurements

phenotype_measurements:
  # Spirometry - Lung Function Tests
  - id: owg:phenotype-001
    name: FEV1 measurement - Participant P001
    description: Forced expiratory volume in 1 second, pre-bronchodilator
    observation_type: FEV1
    quantity_measured:
      value: "2.85"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000099
        name: liter
    range_low:
      value: "3.20"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000099
        name: liter
    range_high:
      value: "4.50"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000099
        name: liter
    phenotype:
      id: HP:0002094
      name: Dyspnea
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-001
      name: Participant 001
    measurement_date: "2024-03-15"

  # FeNO - Airway Inflammation Marker
  - id: owg:phenotype-005
    name: FeNO measurement - Participant P002
    description: Fractional exhaled nitric oxide at 50 mL/s flow rate
    observation_type: FeNO
    quantity_measured:
      value: "42.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000170
        name: parts per billion
    range_low:
      value: "0.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000170
        name: parts per billion
    range_high:
      value: "25.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000170
        name: parts per billion
    phenotype:
      id: HP:0002099
      name: Asthma
    participant:
      id: owg:participant-002
      name: Participant 002
    measurement_date: "2024-03-16"
Gene Expression Measurements - mRNA expression with tissue context 
# Expression Measurement Examples
# Demonstrates GeneExpressionMeasurement with target specification and tissue/cell context

gene_expression_measurements:
  # MUC5AC gene expression in bronchial epithelium
  - id: owg:geneexp-001-muc5ac-control
    name: MUC5AC mRNA - Control ALI culture
    description: MUC5AC gene expression in untreated bronchial epithelial cells at ALI
    observation_type: gene_expression
    quantity_measured:
      value: "1.0"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000186
        name: dimensionless unit
    target_gene:
      id: NCBIGENE:4586
      name: Mucin 5AC, oligomeric mucus/gel-forming
      symbol: MUC5AC
    tissue_context:
      id: UBERON:0002031
      name: bronchial epithelium
    cell_type_context:
      id: CL:0000160
      name: goblet cell
    assay_method: qrt_pcr
    normalization_reference: GAPDH
    measurement_date: "2024-03-15"

  - id: owg:geneexp-002-muc5ac-il13
    name: MUC5AC mRNA - IL-13 stimulated
    description: MUC5AC upregulation after IL-13 stimulation (10 ng/mL, 14 days)
    observation_type: gene_expression
    quantity_measured:
      value: "8.5"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000186
        name: dimensionless unit
    target_gene:
      id: NCBIGENE:4586
      name: Mucin 5AC, oligomeric mucus/gel-forming
      symbol: MUC5AC
    tissue_context:
      id: UBERON:0002031
      name: bronchial epithelium
    cell_type_context:
      id: CL:0000160
      name: goblet cell
    assay_method: qrt_pcr
    normalization_reference: GAPDH
    measurement_date: "2024-03-15"

docs.title: Complete Study Examples
docs.text:
For larger examples showing complete study structures, see the examples directory on GitHub:

  • Comprehensive Asthma Study - Full cohort with participants, exposures, biomarkers, phenotypes
  • PM2.5 Cohort Exposure Study - Air pollution exposure with environmental measurements
  • Synthetic Population Study - Geographic hierarchy with households and study linkage
  • Cell Culture Toxicant Study - 2D, 3D, and organ-on-chip models with BaP exposure
  • In Vitro Airway Measurements - ALI cultures with ciliary function and mucus data

docs.title: Quick Reference
docs.text:
Here's a minimal example showing the core patterns:

studies:
  - id: owg:study001
    name: "Example Exposure Study"
    study_type: "cohort study"
    population: "Adults aged 18-65"

participants:
  - id: owg:participant001
    participant_id: "P001"
    age: 45
    sex: female
    part_of_cohort: owg:cohort001

exposure_measurements:
  - id: owg:measurement001
    name: "Lead blood level"
    participant: owg:participant001
    measured_entity:
      id: CHEBI:25016
      name: "lead atom"
    quantity_measured:
      value: "3.5"
      unit:
        id: UO:0000274
        name: "microgram per deciliter"

docs.title: Outcome Measurement Data Model
docs.text:
A LinkML data model for representing biological measurements, assays, and experimental protocols in the context of outcomes research.

URI: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

Name: outcomes_working_group

expression or modification is being measured, with identifi... taxon_id NCBI Taxonomy identifier temporal_resolution Temporal resolution for video acquisition (fps or acquisition rate) test_substance The chemical entity being tested, with full identifier information three_d_architecture Type of 3D culture architecture (spheroid, organoid, scaffold-based, etc three_d_cell_cultures Collection of 3D cell cultures time_post_exposure Time elapsed between end of exposure and measurement (recovery period) tissue_context The anatomical tissue or structure where expression was measured, with identi... tissue_origin Tissue from which the cell line was derived two_d_cell_cultures Collection of 2D cell cultures uberon_id UBERON anatomical identifier unit The unit of measurement unit_label A human-readable label for the unit upper_bound The upper bound of the range upstream_event Upstream key event value The numeric value of the quantity vehicle_solvent Vehicle or solvent used to deliver the test substance (e viability_normalized Whether data were normalized to account for cell viability/cytotoxicity voxel_depth Depth of voxels for 3D imaging in micrometers wash_steps Description of wash steps performed before exposure (buffer, number, duration... withdrawal_date Date when the participant withdrew from or completed the study workplace Workplace where exposure occurs xref External database cross-references z_step_size Z-step size for optical stacks (usually in micrometers) zeta_potential Zeta potential in mV, indicating surface charge in the vehicle/medium

docs.title: Class: Analysis
docs.text:
Data analysis and processing parameters describing how measurement data was acquired, processed, normalized, and quality controlled. Links to measurements to provide complete provenance of derived values.

name: Analysis
description: Data analysis and processing parameters describing how measurement data
  was acquired, processed, normalized, and quality controlled. Links to measurements

is_a: NamedThing
attributes:
  normalization_performed:
    name: normalization_performed
    description: Whether data normalization was performed.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: normalization_performed
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: boolean
  data_normalization_method:
    name: data_normalization_method
    description: Method used for data normalization (per area, per cell count, baseline,
      control).

    rank: 1000
    alias: data_normalization_method
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: DataNormalizationMethodEnum
  viability_normalized:
    name: viability_normalized
    description: Whether data were normalized to account for cell viability/cytotoxicity.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: viability_normalized
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: boolean
  baseline_definition:
    name: baseline_definition
    description: How baseline is defined (e.g., response of solvent control, pre-exposure
      value).

    rank: 1000
    alias: baseline_definition
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string
  dose_normalization_method:
    name: dose_normalization_method

      etc.)

    alias: dose_normalization_method
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - InVitroExposure

  raw_data_type:

    description: Type of raw data collected (image stack, video, fluorescence intensity,
      etc.)

    rank: 1000
    alias: raw_data_type
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: RawDataTypeEnum
  analysis_software:
    name: analysis_software
    description: Software used for data analysis (e.g., CellProfiler, ImageJ, R, MATLAB).

    rank: 1000
    alias: analysis_software
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string

    rank: 1000
    alias: analysis_software_version
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string
  automation_level:
    name: automation_level
    description: Level of automation in data processing (manual, semi-automated, fully
      automated).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: automation_level
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: AutomationLevelEnum
  algorithm_type:
    name: algorithm_type
    description: Type of algorithm used for analysis (e.g., thresholding, segmentation,
      machine learning).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: algorithm_type
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string
  pipeline_reference:
    name: pipeline_reference
    description: Reference to analysis pipeline (workflow name/version, GitHub URL,
      DOI).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: pipeline_reference
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string
  data_transformation:
    name: data_transformation
    description: Mathematical transformation applied to data (log, square root, etc.)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: data_transformation
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: DataTransformationEnum
  replicate_combination_method:
    name: replicate_combination_method
    description: Method for combining replicate measurements (mean, median, fitted

    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: replicate_combination_method
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: ReplicateCombinationMethodEnum
  outlier_detection_method:
    name: outlier_detection_method
    description: Method used for outlier detection (e.g., IQR, Grubbs test, ROUT).

    rank: 1000
    alias: outlier_detection_method
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis

    rank: 1000
    alias: outlier_removal_performed

    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: boolean

    name: imaging_magnification

    rank: 1000
    alias: imaging_magnification
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: string
  pixel_size:
    name: pixel_size
    description: Size of image pixels in micrometers or nanometers.

    rank: 1000
    alias: pixel_size
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true

    name: voxel_depth

    rank: 1000
    alias: voxel_depth
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  z_step_size:
    name: z_step_size
    description: Z-step size for optical stacks (usually in micrometers).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: z_step_size
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  number_of_z_slices:
    name: number_of_z_slices
    description: Number of Z-slices in an optical stack.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: number_of_z_slices
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: integer
  temporal_resolution:
    name: temporal_resolution
    description: Temporal resolution for video acquisition (fps or acquisition rate).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: temporal_resolution
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  acquisition_duration:
    name: acquisition_duration
    description: Total duration of video or time-series acquisition.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: acquisition_duration
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: QuantityValue
    inlined: true
  motion_stabilization_applied:
    name: motion_stabilization_applied
    description: Whether motion stabilization/drift correction was applied to images
      or video.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: motion_stabilization_applied
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis
    range: boolean
  frame_rate:
    name: frame_rate
    description: Frame rate of video acquisition in frames per second.

    rank: 1000
    alias: frame_rate
    owner: Analysis
    domain_of:
    - Analysis

docs.title: Enum: CellCultureGrowthModeEnum
docs.text:
Cell culture growth modes including traditional and advanced systems. Based on CLO cell culture growth mode terms.

URI: owg:CellCultureGrowthModeEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description adherent CLO:0000028 Cells grow attached to a surface suspension CLO:0000029 Cells grow suspended in culture medium air_liquid_interface OBI:0600047 Cells cultured at interface between air and liquid medium (ALI) three_dimensional None Cells grown in 3D matrix or scaffold organoid None Self-organizing 3D tissue culture from stem cells spheroid None Spherical cellular aggregates formed by self-aggregation

docs.title: Class: CellularSystem
docs.text:

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

docs.title: Class: CensusTract
docs.text:
A census tract is a small, relatively permanent geographic area within a county, used to collect and present demographic data from the census, usually containing between 2,500 and 8,000 residents and designed to be as homogeneous as possible in terms of population characteristics and living conditions.

URI: owg:CensusTract

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: CoCulture
id_prefixes:
- owg
description: Co-culture systems combining multiple cell types to simulate tissue microenvironments
  and cell-cell interactions.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

slots:
- coculture_configuration
- cell_type_ratios
- substrate_type

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: CoCulture
id_prefixes:
- owg
description: Co-culture systems combining multiple cell types to simulate tissue microenvironments
  and cell-cell interactions.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
is_a: CellularSystem
attributes:
  coculture_configuration:
    name: coculture_configuration
    description: Physical configuration of co-culture (direct contact, transwell,
      microfluidic).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: coculture_configuration
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CoCulture
    range: CoCultureConfigurationEnum
  cell_type_ratios:
    name: cell_type_ratios
    description: Ratios between different cell types in co-culture (e.g., "epithelial:stromal
      = 3:1").
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: cell_type_ratios
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CoCulture
    range: string
    multivalued: true
  substrate_type:
    name: substrate_type
    description: Type of culture substrate or surface material.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: substrate_type
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellCultureConditions
    - TwoDCellCulture
    - ThreeDCellCulture
    - CoCulture
    range: SubstrateTypeEnum
  cell_line:
    name: cell_line
    description: The cell line used in the culture system. References a genetically
      stable cultured cell population.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: CLO:0000031
    alias: cell_line
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellLine
    inlined: true
  cell_line_lineage:
    name: cell_line_lineage
    description: The lineage or derivation history of the cell line, including original
      tissue source and passage history.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: cell_line_lineage
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: string
  primary_cultured_cell:
    name: primary_cultured_cell
    description: Primary cells directly isolated from tissue, not from an established
      cell line. Reference to Cell Ontology term.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: primary_cultured_cell
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellType
    inlined: true
  cell_culture_type:
    name: cell_culture_type
    description: The cell type being cultured, with ontology reference.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: EFO:0000324
    alias: cell_culture_type
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellLine
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellType
    inlined: true
  anatomical_origin:
    name: anatomical_origin
    description: The anatomical location from which cells were derived (e.g., lung,
      intestine).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: UBERON:0001062
    alias: anatomical_origin
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: AnatomicalEntity
    inlined: true
  cell_culture_growth_mode:
    name: cell_culture_growth_mode
    description: Mode of cell culture growth (adherent, suspension, ALI, 3D, etc.)
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    exact_mappings:
    - CLO:0000030
    rank: 1000
    alias: cell_culture_growth_mode
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellCultureConditions
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellCultureGrowthModeEnum
  cell_line_modification:
    name: cell_line_modification
    description: Genetic or other modifications applied to the cell line (e.g., transfection,
      CRISPR editing, viral transduction).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: cell_line_modification
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellLineModificationEnum
  induced_pluripotent_stem_cell_line:
    name: induced_pluripotent_stem_cell_line
    description: Whether this is an induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC) line.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    exact_mappings:
    - CLO:0037307
    rank: 1000
    alias: induced_pluripotent_stem_cell_line
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: boolean
  culture_conditions:
    name: culture_conditions
    description: Detailed cell culture conditions including medium, environment, and
      timing.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: culture_conditions
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellCultureConditions
    inlined: true
  culture_media:
    name: culture_media
    description: Cell culture medium formulation with supplements.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: culture_media
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellCultureConditions
    - CellularSystem
    range: CellCultureMedium
    inlined: true
  environmental_measurements:
    name: environmental_measurements
    description: Collection of environmental condition measurements (CO2, O2, temperature,
      humidity, pH) for the culture system.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: environmental_measurements
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - Container
    - CellCultureConditions
    - CellularSystem
    range: EnvironmentalMeasurement
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  mechanical_measurements:
    name: mechanical_measurements
    description: Collection of mechanical stimulation measurements (stretch, shear,
      flow) for advanced culture systems like organ-on-chip.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: mechanical_measurements
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - Container
    - CellularSystem
    range: MechanicalMeasurement
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  membrane_properties:
    name: membrane_properties
    description: Collection of membrane property measurements (pore size, TEER) for
      transwell and organ-on-chip systems.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: membrane_properties
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellularSystem
    range: MembranePropertyMeasurement
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  model_species:
    name: model_species
    description: The species of origin for the cells in the model system.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000
    alias: model_species
    owner: CoCulture
    domain_of:
    - CellLine
    - ModelSystem
    range: Organism
    inlined: true
  id:
    name: id
    description: A unique identifier for a thing
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
    rank: 1000

docs.title: Enum: CoCultureConfigurationEnum
docs.text:
Physical configurations for co-culture systems combining multiple cell types.

URI: owg:CoCultureConfigurationEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description direct_contact None Cell types in direct physical contact on same surface transwell None Cell types separated by permeable membrane insert conditioned_medium None One cell type exposed to conditioned medium from another microfluidic None Cell types in separate microfluidic compartments with shared media spheroid_core_shell None One cell type forms core, another forms surrounding shell patterned None Cell types arranged in defined spatial patterns

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description coculture_configuration Physical configuration of co-culture (direct contact, transwell, microfluidic...

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: CoCultureConfigurationEnum
description: Physical configurations for co-culture systems combining multiple cell
  types.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  direct_contact:
    text: direct_contact
    description: Cell types in direct physical contact on same surface
  transwell:
    text: transwell
    description: Cell types separated by permeable membrane insert
    exact_mappings:
    - OBI:0001950
  conditioned_medium:
    text: conditioned_medium
    description: One cell type exposed to conditioned medium from another
  microfluidic:
    text: microfluidic
    description: Cell types in separate microfluidic compartments with shared media
  spheroid_core_shell:
    text: spheroid_core_shell
    description: One cell type forms core, another forms surrounding shell
  patterned:
    text: patterned
    description: Cell types arranged in defined spatial patterns

docs.title: Class: EnvironmentalMeasurement
docs.text:
A measurement of environmental conditions for cell culture systems including temperature, CO2, O2 percentage, humidity, and pH. Used to document incubator and culture conditions. Valid observation_type values include: co2_percentage, o2_percentage, temperature, humidity, nitrogen_balance, ph.

URI: owg:EnvironmentalMeasurement

 classDiagram
    class EnvironmentalMeasurement
    click EnvironmentalMeasurement href "../EnvironmentalMeasurement/"
      Measurement <|-- EnvironmentalMeasurement
        click Measurement href "../Measurement/"

      EnvironmentalMeasurement : category

      EnvironmentalMeasurement : description

      EnvironmentalMeasurement : id

      EnvironmentalMeasurement : name

      EnvironmentalMeasurement : observation_type





        EnvironmentalMeasurement --> "0..1" MeasurementTypeEnum : observation_type
        click MeasurementTypeEnum href "../MeasurementTypeEnum/"



      EnvironmentalMeasurement : quantity_measured





        EnvironmentalMeasurement --> "0..1" QuantityValue : quantity_measured
        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"



      EnvironmentalMeasurement : range_high





        EnvironmentalMeasurement --> "0..1" QuantityValue : range_high
        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"



      EnvironmentalMeasurement : range_low





        EnvironmentalMeasurement --> "0..1" QuantityValue : range_low
        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"



      EnvironmentalMeasurement : xref

docs.title: Class: ExposableSubject
docs.text:
An entity that can be exposed to a substance or environmental factor. This abstract class provides a common parent for both biological model systems (cell cultures, organoids) and study participants, enabling polymorphic linking from ExposureEvent to any exposable subject.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: owg:ExposableSubject

 classDiagram
    class ExposableSubject
    click ExposableSubject href "../ExposableSubject/"
      NamedThing <|-- ExposableSubject
        click NamedThing href "../NamedThing/"


      ExposableSubject <|-- Participant
        click Participant href "../Participant/"
      ExposableSubject <|-- ModelSystem
        click ModelSystem href "../ModelSystem/"


      ExposableSubject : category

      ExposableSubject : description

      ExposableSubject : id

      ExposableSubject : name

      ExposableSubject : xref

docs.title: Enum: MeasurementTypeEnum
docs.text:
Types of measurements and observations for outcomes research, with emphasis on respiratory health and environmental toxicant effects.

URI: owg:MeasurementTypeEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description FEV1 NCIT:C38083 Forced expiratory volume in 1 second FVC NCIT:C38082 Forced vital capacity FEV1_FEC_ratio NCIT:C120835 Ratio of FEV1 to FVC (Tiffeneau-Pinelli index) FEF25_75 NCIT:C38085 Forced expiratory flow at 25-75% of FVC peak_expiratory_flow NCIT:C38086 Peak expiratory flow rate DLCO NCIT:C38087 Diffusing capacity of the lung for carbon monoxide FeNO NCIT:C124353 Fractional exhaled nitric oxide (airway inflammation marker) bronchodilator_response None Change in lung function after bronchodilator administration lung_function_decline_rate None Rate of decline in lung function over time ciliary_beat_frequency GO:0003341 Frequency of ciliary beating in Hz ciliary_active_area_percentage None Percentage of epithelial surface with active cilia cilia_per_cell None Number of cilia per epithelial cell cilia_length None Length of cilia in micrometers percentage_ciliated_cells None Percentage of cells that are ciliated asl_height None Airway surface liquid height in micrometers periciliary_layer_depth None Depth of periciliary liquid layer (reduced in disease) mucus_layer_thickness None Thickness of the mucus gel layer mucociliary_transport_rate GO:0120197 Rate of mucociliary transport (mm/min) mucociliary_directionality None Directionality and coordination of mucociliary transport particle_clearance_rate None Rate of particle clearance from airways goblet_cell_count CL:0000160 Number or percentage of goblet cells goblet_to_ciliated_ratio None Ratio of goblet cells to ciliated cells mucin_protein_concentration docs.title: Class: MechanicalMeasurement
docs.text:
A measurement of mechanical stimulation parameters for advanced culture systems like organ-on-chip and microphysiological systems. Includes stretch frequency/amplitude, shear stress, flow rate, and pressure. Valid observation_type values include: stretch_frequency, stretch_amplitude, shear_stress, flow_rate, perfusion_rate, pressure.

URI: owg:MechanicalMeasurement

 classDiagram
    class MechanicalMeasurement
    click MechanicalMeasurement href "../MechanicalMeasurement/"
      Measurement <|-- MechanicalMeasurement
        click Measurement href "../Measurement/"

      MechanicalMeasurement : category

      MechanicalMeasurement : id

      MechanicalMeasurement : name

      MechanicalMeasurement : observation_type





        MechanicalMeasurement --> "0..1" MeasurementTypeEnum : observation_type
        click MeasurementTypeEnum href "../MeasurementTypeEnum/"



      MechanicalMeasurement : quantity_measured





        MechanicalMeasurement --> "0..1" QuantityValue : quantity_measured
        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"

        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"



      MechanicalMeasurement : range_low





        MechanicalMeasurement --> "0..1" QuantityValue : range_low
        click QuantityValue href "../QuantityValue/"



      MechanicalMeasurement : xref

docs.title: Class: MembranePropertyMeasurement
docs.text:
A measurement of membrane properties for transwell, ALI, and organ-on-chip culture systems. Includes pore size, pore density, thickness, surface area, and TEER. Valid observation_type values include: pore_size, pore_density, thickness, surface_area, teer.

URI: owg:MembranePropertyMeasurement

 classDiagram
    class MembranePropertyMeasurement
    click MembranePropertyMeasurement href "../MembranePropertyMeasurement/"

docs.title: Class: Participant
docs.text:
A role representing an individual's participation in a study. Links a Person to a specific study cohort and captures study-specific identifiers and attributes. Age and sex are recorded at enrollment and may differ from the Person's current values or values in other study registrations.

URI: owg:Participant

 classDiagram
    class Participant
    click Participant href "../Participant/"
      ExposableSubject <|-- Participant
        click ExposableSubject href "../ExposableSubject/"
      StudyEntity <|-- Participant
        click StudyEntity href "../StudyEntity/"

      Participant : age

      Participant : category

      Participant : description

      Participant : enrollment_date

      Participant : id

      Participant : name

      Participant : part_of_cohort





        Participant --> "0..1" Cohort : part_of_cohort
        click Cohort href "../Cohort/"



      Participant : participant_id

      Participant : person





        Participant --> "0..1" Person : person
        click Person href "../Person/"



      Participant : sex





        Participant --> "0..1" SexEnum : sex
        click SexEnum href "../SexEnum/"



      Participant : study_arm

      Participant : withdrawal_date

      Participant : xref

    • StudyEntity

name: Participant
description: A role representing an individual's participation in a study. Links a
  Person to a specific study cohort and captures study-specific identifiers and attributes.
  Age and sex are recorded at enrollment and may differ from the Person's current
  values or values in other study registrations.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/EHS-Data-Standards/outcomes_working_group
is_a: StudyEntity
mixins:
- ExposableSubject
slots:
- person
- part_of_cohort
- participant_id
- age
- sex
- enrollment_date
- withdrawal_date
- study_arm
slot_usage:
  age:
    name: age
    description: Age of the participant in years at the time of study enrollment.
      This is a study-specific value that may differ from other study registrations
      or the person's current age.
  sex:
    name: sex
    description: Biological sex of the participant as recorded at study enrollment.
      This is the value captured during study registration and may be used for stratification
      or eligibility criteria.

docs.title: Class: Person
docs.text:
A person (individual human being) with demographic and geographic attributes. Persons can participate in studies through the Participant role, which links a Person to a specific study cohort. In synthetic population contexts, persons are members of households within geographic hierarchies. Age and sex on Person represent current or snapshot values from the source data (e.g., census), distinct from study-specific values captured on Participant at enrollment.

URI: owg:Person

 classDiagram

    click Person href "../Person/"
      NamedThing <|-- Person
        click NamedThing href "../NamedThing/"

      Person : age

      Person : assigned_school

        click School href "../School/"

      Person : category

      Person : county_federal_information_processing_standard_code

      Person : description

      Person : household_head_age

      Person : household_head_race

      Person : household_identifier

      Person : household_income

      Person : household_size

      Person : id

      Person : name

      Person : person_order

      Person : race

      Person : relationship_to_household_head





        Person --> "0..1" RelationshipToHouseholdHeadEnum : relationship_to_household_head
        click RelationshipToHouseholdHeadEnum href "../RelationshipToHouseholdHeadEnum/"



      Person : serial_number

      Person : sex





        Person --> "0..1" SexEnum : sex
        click SexEnum href "../SexEnum/"



      Person : species

      Person : state_federal_information_processing_standard_code

      Person : xref

docs.title: Class: PublicUseMicrodataArea
docs.text:
Public Use Microdata Areas (PUMAs) are non-overlapping, statistical geographic areas that partition each state or equivalent entity into geographic areas containing no fewer than 100,000 people each. They cover the entirety of the United States, Puerto Rico, and Guam.
